name: cinematic_moody
description: Desaturated cool-with-warm-accent key; 3:1 key-to-fill ratio; strong rim to separate hero silhouette from dark backdrop. Used for night exteriors and any prompt containing 'moody', 'noir-ish', 'dramatic'.

metadata.author: team
metadata.inspiration: Deakins 1917 night exteriors; Chivo Birdman interiors
